message:
fix(viewer,search): Esc-to-close detail pane + cross-hash singleflight coalescing

Self-review of the bv-142 follow-up surfaced two more issues:

* index.html: the close button on the graph detail pane I added a tooltip
  referencing "(Esc)", but no Escape handler actually closed the pane —
  the existing escape.window listeners only handle the issue modal, the
  graph search bar, and the keyboard help dialog. Wired up
  @keydown.escape.window on the detail pane root that nulls graphDetailNode
  and triggers the same forceGraphModule cleanup as the close button,
  gated on (!selectedIssue) so the issue-modal Esc handler stays
  authoritative when both layers are open.

* pkg/search/metrics_cache_impl.go: singleflight key was
  "refresh:"+observedHash, so two callers that observed slightly different
  hashes mid-drift triggered two parallel Refresh() calls instead of
  coalescing — defeating the stampede guard the singleflight is supposed
  to enforce. The TestMetricsCacheEnsureFresh_SingleflightAcrossHashDrift
  regression test caught it (got 2 Refresh calls, want 1). Switched to a
  constant key; the inner isFreshForHash recheck still uses the caller's
  observed hash so correctness is preserved, and after one Refresh runs
  every coalesced caller observes the latest snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
